creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Wed Dec 18 17:02:13 2013
New Revision: 336849
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336849

Log:
  - Update to 1.249
  - Add LICENSE
  - Update and sort *_DEPENDS
  - Use USES=gmake
  - Sort make knobs
  - Support STAGEDIR
  
  PR:		ports/184700
  Submitted by:	sunpoet

Modified:
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2/Makefile
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2/Makefile	Wed Dec 18 16:58:09 2013	(r336848)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2/Makefile	Wed Dec 18 17:02:13 2013	(r336849)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Gtk2
-PORTVERSION=	1.243
+PORTVERSION=	1.249
 CATEGORIES=	x11-toolkits lang perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN SF/${PORTNAME:L}-perl/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -10,25 +10,21 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	swills@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Perl module for Gtk+ 2.x graphical user interface library
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-ExtUtils-Depends>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-Depends \
-		p5-ExtUtils-PkgConfig>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-PkgConfig \
-		p5-Cairo>=0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/p5-Cairo \
-		p5-Pango>=0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango \
-		p5-Glib2>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Glib2
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Pango>=0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango \
-		p5-Cairo>=0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/p5-Cairo \
-		p5-Glib2>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Glib2
+LICENSE=	LGPL21
 
-USE_GNOME=	gtk20 pango
-USES=		perl5
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Cairo>=1:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/p5-Cairo \
+		p5-ExtUtils-Depends>=0.300:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-Depends \
+		p5-ExtUtils-PkgConfig>=1.03:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-PkgConfig \
+		p5-Glib2>=1.280:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Glib2 \
+		p5-Pango>=1.220:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango
+RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Cairo>=1:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/p5-Cairo \
+		p5-Glib2>=1.280:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Glib2 \
+		p5-Pango>=1.220:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/p5-Pango
+
+CONFIGURE_ENV=	FORCE_GMAKE=yes
+MAKE_ENV=	LANG=C
+USES=		gmake perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
-CONFIGURE_ENV+=	FORCE_GMAKE=yes
-MAKE_ENV+=	LANG=C
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-post-install:
-	@cd ${WRKSRC}/blib/man3 && ${FIND} * -name "*.3" | ${SED} \
-		's,^,${MAN3PREFIX:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}/man/man3/,' >> ${TMPPLIST}
+USE_GNOME=	gtk20 pango
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2/distinfo	Wed Dec 18 16:58:09 2013	(r336848)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2/distinfo	Wed Dec 18 17:02:13 2013	(r336849)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (Gtk2-1.243.tar.gz) = 740472
+SHA256 (Gtk2-1.249.tar.gz) = e46e069eb74a1fd93f547195575a69d44dbe6ee30cb9bae27c514d59ffe9873a
+SIZE (Gtk2-1.249.tar.gz) = 742086
